phase8_excerpt:
The Homebrewery is a tool that allows you to create and share homebrew content for Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition. It uses Markdown syntax mixed with some custom CSS to render your content in the style of the Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition Player's Handbook.

The Homebrewery is built on the work of the Reddit user /u/stolksdorf. The tool is open source and available on GitHub. You can contribute to the project or fork it to create your own version.
fixture_notes: Simple paragraph flow from Homebrewery. Tests text continuity and paragraph integrity.
